violations.text: Muffins, breakfast sandwiches packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels (missing ingredients list). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

(Desserts and pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Inspector observed leakage at the dishwasher and ice machine. Per PIC, work order was submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Inspector observed a drain line from the retail ceiling draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The exterior wall in the walk in freezer was observed is in poor repair. Inspector observed missing panel and ice buildup. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
